# Elite Painting Solutions

## About
Elite Painting Solutions is a professional painting company based in Vero Beach, Florida. We provide high-quality interior and exterior painting services for residential and commercial properties across Indian River County and St. Lucie County.

## Services
- Interior Painting
- Exterior Painting
- Commercial Painting
- Cabinet Refinishing
- Pressure Washing
- Drywall Repair
- Color Consultation
- Staining & Sealing

## Service Areas
Vero Beach, Sebastian, Fort Pierce, Port St. Lucie, Wabasso Beach, Hutchinson Island, Oslo, Florida Ridge, Orchid, North Beach, Roseland, South Beach, Winter Beach

## Contact
- Phone: (772) 539-2115
- Email: info@verobeachpainting.com
- Location: Vero Beach, Florida
- Hours: Mon – Sat 7AM–6PM
